{"settings":"{
  "security.workspace.trust.untrustedFiles": "open",
  "editor.unicodeHighlight.invisibleCharacters": false,
  "redhat.telemetry.enabled": true,
  "[html]": {
    "editor.defaultFormatter": "mohd-akram.vscode-html-format"
  },
  "editor.formatOnSave": true,
  "cmake.options.statusBarVisibility": "visible",
  "explorer.confirmDelete": false,
  "makefile.configureOnOpen": true,
  "cmake.pinnedCommands": [
    "workbench.action.tasks.configureTaskRunner",
    "workbench.action.tasks.runTask"
  ],
  "notebook.formatOnSave.enabled": true,
  "explorer.confirmDragAndDrop": false,
  "github.copilot.enable": {
    "*": true,
    "plaintext": false,
    "markdown": true,
    "scminput": false,
    "python": true,
    "mysql": true,
    "html": false
  },
  "liveServer.settings.donotVerifyTags": true,
  "liveServer.settings.donotShowInfoMsg": true,
  "prettier.embeddedLanguageFormatting": "off",
  "editor.minimap.maxColumn": 50,
  "git.openRepositoryInParentFolders": "always",
  "git.enableSmartCommit": true,
  "git.confirmSync": false,
  "git.autofetch": true,
  "github.copilot.nextEditSuggestions.enabled": true,
  "workbench.localHistory.maxFileEntries": 100,
  "workbench.localHistory.maxFileSize": 512,
  "workbench.trustedDomains.promptInTrustedWorkspace": true,
  "geminicodeassist.inlineSuggestions.enableAuto": true,
  "[jsonc]": {
    "editor.defaultFormatter": "vscode.json-language-features"
  },
  "explorer.fileNesting.patterns": {
    "*.ts": "${capture}.js",
    "*.js": "${capture}.js.map, ${capture}.min.js, ${capture}.d.ts",
    "*.jsx": "${capture}.js",
    "*.tsx": "${capture}.ts",
    "tsconfig.json": "tsconfig.*.json",
    "package.json": "package-lock.json, yarn.lock, pnpm-lock.yaml, bun.lockb, bun.lock",
    "*.sqlite": "${capture}.${extname}-*",
    "*.db": "${capture}.${extname}-*",
    "*.sqlite3": "${capture}.${extname}-*",
    "*.db3": "${capture}.${extname}-*",
    "*.sdb": "${capture}.${extname}-*",
    "*.s3db": "${capture}.${extname}-*"
  },
  "notebook.cellExecutionTimeVerbosity": "verbose",
  "notebook.lineNumbers": "on",
  "git.ignoreRebaseWarning": true,
  "extensions.webWorker": true,
  "liveServer.settings.CustomBrowser": "chrome",
  "terminal.integrated.gpuAcceleration": "on",
  "database-client.autoSync": true,
  "pgsql.serverGroups": [
    {
      "name": "Servers",
      "id": "3C7135C5-122B-458C-9D87-B8F25B06EA2F",
      "isDefault": true
    }
  ],
  "pgsql.connections": [
    {
      "id": "167052E2-91BE-40A3-A528-B9A60166AA2C",
      "groupId": "3C7135C5-122B-458C-9D87-B8F25B06EA2F",
      "authenticationType": "SqlLogin",
      "connectTimeout": 15,
      "applicationName": "vscode-pgsql",
      "clientEncoding": "utf8",
      "sslmode": "require",
      "savePassword": true,
      "server": "aws-0-eu-west-3.pooler.supabase.com",
      "user": "postgres.kumqhytmymzmbywlwepz",
      "port": "6543",
      "database": "postgres",
      "password": "",
      "profileName": "aws-0-eu-west-3.pooler.supabase.com, postgres (postgres.kumqhytmymzmbywlwepz)",
      "sshPassword": "",
      "expiresOn": 0
    }
  ],
  "diffEditor.codeLens": true,
  "pgsql.enableQueryHistoryCapture": false,
  "explorer.confirmPasteNative": false,
  "lldb.suppressUpdateNotifications": true,
  "hexeditor.columnWidth": 32,
  "hexeditor.showDecodedText": true,
  "hexeditor.defaultEndianness": "little",
  "hexeditor.inspectorType": "aside",
  "workbench.editorAssociations": {
    "*.copilotmd": "vscode.markdown.preview.editor",
    "{hexdiff}:/**/*.*": "hexEditor.hexedit",
    "*.o": "hexEditor.hexedit"
  },
  "security.allowedUNCHosts": [
    "wsl.localhost"
  ],
  "editor.multiCursorLimit": 100000,
  "files.autoSave": "afterDelay",
  "liveServer.settings.port": 0,
  "liveServer.settings.host": "localhost",
  "editor.unicodeHighlight.ambiguousCharacters": false,
  "jupyter.askForKernelRestart": false,
  "dataWrangler.outputRenderer.columnInsights.displayByDefault": true,
  "dataWrangler.outputRenderer.enabledTypes": {
    "numpy.ndarray": true,
    "builtins.list": true,
    "builtins.dict": true,
    "torch.Tensor": true,
    "pyspark.sql.connect.dataframe.DataFrame": true,
    "pyspark.sql.dataframe.DataFrame": true,
    "polars.series.series.Series": true,
    "polars.dataframe.frame.DataFrame": true,
    "xarray.core.dataarray.DataArray": true,
    "tensorflow.python.framework.ops.EagerTensor": true
  },
  "dataWrangler.panels.displayOnTabFocus": false,
  "dataWrangler.defaultViewingFilterOptions": "advanced",
  "dataWrangler.experiments.datatypes.pyspark": true,
  "dataWrangler.experiments.autoDetectCsvDelimiter": true,
  "dataWrangler.experiments.fastCsvParsing": true,
  "workbench.colorTheme": "Visual Studio 2017 Light - C++"
}"}
